articles.title: Do you support the U.S. strikes on Iran? Here’s what 300 readers said.
articles.description:
As debate over a widening war intensifies, readers — including many who identify as Iranian — share their perspectives and concerns.

The post Do you support the U.S. strikes on Iran? Here’s what 300 readers said. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 300 Boston readers shared their views on U.S. strikes against Iran amid rising tensions.
Many respondents identified as Iranian, highlighting local community concerns and perspectives.
Debate over military action may influence local activism and community discussions in Boston.

articles.title: Paul Pierce tells Celtics fans to keep expectations in check over Jayson Tatum’s return
articles.description:
"We can’t expect him to be the same player right away that he was before he got hurt."

The post Paul Pierce tells Celtics fans to keep expectations in check over Jayson Tatum’s return appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Paul Pierce advises Celtics fans to temper expectations for Jayson Tatum's return from injury.
Tatum's performance may not match his pre-injury level immediately, according to Pierce.
Fans should prepare for a gradual adjustment period as Tatum reintegrates into the team.

articles.title: Patriots are reportedly releasing WR Stefon Diggs after 1 season in New England
articles.description:
By releasing Diggs, New England is saving nearly $17 million in cap space this offseason.

The post Patriots are reportedly releasing WR Stefon Diggs after 1 season in New England appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots release WR Stefon Diggs after one season in New England.
This move saves the team nearly $17 million in cap space.
Local fans may see changes in the team's roster and performance next season.

articles.title: High court judge denies DiZoglio’s ask for outside attorney in audit lawsuit
articles.description:
State Auditor Diana DiZoglio must respond to Attorney General Andrea Campbell's move to strike the lawsuit later this week.

The post High court judge denies DiZoglio’s ask for outside attorney in audit lawsuit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: High court judge denies Auditor DiZoglio's request for outside attorney in lawsuit.
DiZoglio must respond to AG Andrea Campbell's motion by the end of this week.
The ruling affects the ongoing audit lawsuit's proceedings and DiZoglio's legal strategy.

articles.title: Former school bus driver indicted in Hyde Park crash that killed 5-year-old boy
articles.description:
Jean Charles faces homicide and manslaughter charges in the April 28 crash that killed Lens Joseph.

The post Former school bus driver indicted in Hyde Park crash that killed 5-year-old boy appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jean Charles indicted for homicide and manslaughter in Hyde Park crash.
The incident occurred on April 28, killing 5-year-old Lens Joseph.
This case raises concerns about school bus safety in Boston.
